productDisplayName: Facit Men Fusion Brie Grey Briefs
description: Composition Grey melange brief made of 100% premium cotton in a 1X1 rib knit, has a durable signature logo waistband, red panels on either side of the front pouch, flat seam details and printed label on the inner Fitting Mid rise Wash care Machine wash warm at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry cleanable This mid-rise fusion brief from facit is crafted using pure cotton in a 1X1 rib knit that lets the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch in ease. The brief comes in collegiate-inspired colour combinations that never go out of style, while the printed label on the inside provides abrasion-free comfort. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model with waist 34" and hips 38"
